creator: rizor.reardon@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Alexey Vyskubov from comment #0)

Sorry but i can't reproduce, julia is working fine for me.

I have seen bug's like this related to cpuid ether not detecting the uarch or julia not supporting a particular uarch, can you tell me what uarch you are using.

Also the FreeBSD port of julia is using the libz in FreeBSD, but i will look into cert.pem
